name: The Waning Collective
specialty: Adept investigators, specializing in solving complex mysteries hidden in the Undercity's labyrinthine districts.

members.name: Aramis Valtorian
members.note: A former Iron Fang Consortium enforcer, marked by the scars of his past and the cold, calculating precision of his every move.

members.name: Zara Vel'Shara
members.note: A member of the Wardens of Ash, her eyes glow ominously with the power of the Rifts, hinting at an untold history.

visual: Aramis and Zara are dressed in muted shades of gray, their clothing worn yet mended carefully. They wear concealed weapons and a silver insignia of a waning moon on their left forearm. In public, they carry themselves with a quiet intensity that makes others uneasy.
reputation_note: Rumor has it that they can find anything, even if it's lost in the Rifts themselves, but crossing them may lead to unwanted attention from the Tower Authority.
